text: Now let me search for functions with line counts. I'll use a more sophisticated approach to identify complex functions:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "for file in /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/crates/runtime/src/*.rs; do\n  wc -l \"$file\"\ndone | sort -rn | head -20"}
